name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M25143 Large This Medium CarryAll Dark handbag features a soft lambskin to create a chic, relaxed silhouette, adding a striking touch to 2024 spring/summer runway looks. Polished metal hardware contrasts with a soft-touch pebbled texture. Spacious enough to hold various daily essentials, making it a perfect travel companion. 39 x 30 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)
